channel.title: Posts on Trongpq
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Trongpq

item.description: Insert Lead paragraph here.

item.title: Chapter II: Performance Testing AutoCannon
item.description: How many tester can send multi request in the same time, this issue I meet when I work in my old company, We don't know to test performance send multi request same time by CLI or by Code. And I don't know keyword to find it. Now I find a tool can help me do it. Auto cannon You can install it from npm. https://www.npmjs.com/package/autocannon npm i -g autocannon example

item.title: Chapter I: API Testing PostMan
item.description: Postman: I think if you working in major software development you can hear this name atleast one times Because this tool help you can call api and have many function have you checking what happen when you call api. Today I will talk about some function I wish I know it soon. If you want to create object user by calling api user and random name of user. you can write in postman:

item.title: database
item.description: Xin chào m.n 👋 💬 Ask me about: https://fb.com/biccv [ Transaction ] 1 - 4 properties of database sql 2 - 4 Level Isolate Transaction Unread commited Read commited phantom ... serializable trongpq

item.title: development
item.description: Xin chào m.n 👋 💬 Ask me about: https://fb.com/biccv [SOLID]

item.title: kubenates
item.description: Kubenates Nguồn: https://xuanthulab.net/gioi-thieu-va-cai-dat-kubernetes-cluster.html Cài đặt kubenates là kubemini ngoài ra có thể khởi tạo từ docker desktop của macos or windows Cài đặt kubectl là kubenates client để tương tác với kubenates Chạy lệnh kubectl cluster-info để kiểm tra xem quá trình cài đặt và config đúng chưa Kiểm tra có các node nào đang chạy trên máy: kubectl get node Check thông tin node xem có bị quá tải gì ko bằng lệnh kubectl describe """ kubectl describe node/minikube  ✔ │ minikube ⎈ │ 10:42:24 Name: minikube Roles: control-plane Labels: beta.

item.title: kubenates
item.description: Kubenates Nguồn: https://xuanthulab.net/gioi-thieu-va-cai-dat-kubernetes-cluster.html Cài đặt kubenates là kubemini ngoài ra có thể khởi tạo từ docker desktop của macos or windows Cài đặt kubectl là kubenates client để tương tác với kubenates Chạy lệnh kubectl cluster-info để kiểm tra xem quá trình cài đặt và config đúng chưa Kiểm tra có các node nào đang chạy trên máy: kubectl get node Check thông tin node xem có bị quá tải gì ko bằng lệnh kubectl describe """ kubectl describe node/minikube  ✔ │ minikube ⎈ │ 10:42:24 Name: minikube Roles: control-plane Labels: beta.

item.title: kubenates
item.description: Kubenates Nguồn: https://xuanthulab.net/gioi-thieu-va-cai-dat-kubernetes-cluster.html Cài đặt kubenates là kubemini ngoài ra có thể khởi tạo từ docker desktop của macos or windows Cài đặt kubectl là kubenates client để tương tác với kubenates Chạy lệnh kubectl cluster-info để kiểm tra xem quá trình cài đặt và config đúng chưa Kiểm tra có các node nào đang chạy trên máy: kubectl get node Check thông tin node xem có bị quá tải gì ko bằng lệnh kubectl describe """ kubectl describe node/minikube  ✔ │ minikube ⎈ │ 10:42:24 Name: minikube Roles: control-plane Labels: beta.

item.title: Terraform
item.description: Terraform Terraform Xin Chào mọi người hôm nay mình sẽ tìm hiểu về terraform, blog này sinh ra với mục đích lưu lại những gì mình tìm hiểu hằng ngày để hệ thống kiến thức Terraform là ngôn ngữ infrastructure as Code do công ty Hashicorp tạo ra Terraform còn có tên gọi khác là Hashicorp Language Đầu tiên để khởi tạo dự án ta dùng lệnh (Giả định rằng các bạn đã cài terraform) terraform init

item.title: tools
item.description: Tools Post - API TESTING: API Testing Postman - PERFORMANCE TESTING: Auto Cannon, Hey Auto Cannon: https://www.npmjs.com/package/autocannon Hey: https://github.com/rakyll/hey - AUTOMATION TESTING: Selenium - GRPC UI: Evans https://github.com/ktr0731/evans - PROXY TO CHECK API APP: Whistle Whistle: https://github.com/avwo/whistle - DOCUMENT API: SwaggerUI

item.title: selenium
item.description: Selenium Post

item.title: Using Hugo page bundles
item.description: Page bundles are an optional way to organize page resources within Hugo. You can opt-in to using page bundles in Hugo Clarity with `usePageBundles` in your site configuration --- or in a page's front matter.

item.title: Using Notices
item.description: The "Notices" shortcode enables you to call out pieces of information - sidebars, warnings, tips, etc. To create a notice on a page, you can use the notice shortcode. You use the notice shortcode, with the first parameter being one of note, info, tip, and warning. Then add a title for your note in quotes as the second parameter. The inner body of the note can be whatever markdown you want to create.

item.title: Markdown Syntax Guide
item.description: This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.

item.title: Rich Content
item.description: Hugo ships with several Built-in Shortcodes for rich content, along with a Privacy Config and a set of Simple Shortcodes that enable static and no-JS versions of various social media embeds.

item.title: Placeholder Text
item.description: Lorem est tota propiore conpellat pectoribus de pectora summo.

item.title: Math Typesetting
item.description: Mathematical notation in a Hugo project can be enabled by using third party JavaScript libraries.

item.title: Emoji Support
item.description: Emoji can be enabled in a Hugo project in a number of ways.

item.title: Chapter I: python
item.description: Three hundred and forty-eight years, six months, and nineteen days ago to-day, the Parisians awoke to the sound of all the bells in the triple circuit of the city, the university, and the town ringing a full peal. The sixth of January, 1482, is not, however, a day of which history has preserved the memory. There was nothing notable in the event which thus set the bells and the bourgeois of Paris in a ferment from early morning.

item.title: Chapter I: selenium
item.description: Three hundred and forty-eight years, six months, and nineteen days ago to-day, the Parisians awoke to the sound of all the bells in the triple circuit of the city, the university, and the town ringing a full peal. The sixth of January, 1482, is not, however, a day of which history has preserved the memory. There was nothing notable in the event which thus set the bells and the bourgeois of Paris in a ferment from early morning.
